capabilities.name: Franchise Development
capabilities.purpose: Recruit and qualify franchisees who fit the brand and set up new cafés for success.

capabilities.name: Production & Distribution
capabilities.purpose: Roast coffee centrally to recipe and fulfil standing orders and top-ups to keep cafés supplied.

capabilities.name: Supply Chain Fulfillment
capabilities.purpose: Receive, pick and ship each café's bean/milk/cup/food orders accurately and on time.

capabilities.name: Billing & Collections
capabilities.purpose: Invoice franchisees monthly for royalties and supplies and collect payment accurately and on time.

capabilities.name: Brand & Marketing
capabilities.purpose: Push seasonal menus and promotions to every café and run the loyalty program to engage customers.

capabilities.name: Quality Assurance
capabilities.purpose: Audit and score cafés, run mystery shoppers and corrective plans to keep every café on-brand.

capabilities.name: Café Service Operations
capabilities.purpose: Take orders in-store and via the app, make drinks and run the counter to serve café customers.

capabilities.name: Workforce Management
capabilities.purpose: Hire, schedule and manage barista shifts to run cafés reliably.

capabilities.name: Inventory Management
capabilities.purpose: Count stock, reorder from the roastery or approved vendors, and manage freshness to avoid stockouts.

capabilities.name: Sales & Cash Management
capabilities.purpose: Take payment via POS or prepaid app, report sales and bank takings accurately.

policies.name: Draft agreement when applicant qualified
policies.condition: when an applicant is qualified, draft their franchise agreement

policies.name: Sign agreement when applicant signs
policies.condition: applicant's signature triggers the formal agreement signing

policies.name: Assign territory after agreement signed
policies.condition: once the agreement is signed, assign territory

policies.name: Approve site after territory assigned
policies.condition: territory assignment enables café site approval

policies.name: Open café after site approved
policies.condition: once site approved, open the café

policies.name: Issue corrective plan on failed quality audit
policies.condition: a failed café quality audit requires a corrective plan

policies.name: Issue corrective plan on audit failure
policies.condition: failed audits require corrective plans

policies.name: Escalate audit corrective plan
policies.condition: escalated plans require audit re-verification

policies.name: Create supply order from reorder approval
policies.condition: approved reorder requests trigger a supply order placement

policies.name: Flag discrepancy triggers reorder request
policies.condition: detected stock discrepancies trigger a reorder request

policies.name: Create shipment on supply order placed
policies.condition: placing a supply order creates the shipment to fulfill it

policies.name: Confirm supply order delivery on shipment delivery
policies.condition: shipment delivery confirms the related supply order

policies.name: Flag supply order delay on shipment delay
policies.condition: a shipment delay should be reflected on the supply order

policies.name: Issue invoice on supply order delivery
policies.condition: delivered supply orders are invoiced

policies.name: Fulfil standing order on shipment delivered
policies.condition: if the shipment is for a standing order cycle

policies.name: Initiate payment on invoice issued
policies.condition: issuing an invoice initiates the payment process

policies.name: Record invoice payment on payment success
policies.condition: a successful payment records against the invoice

policies.name: Mark invoice overdue on due date reached without payment
policies.condition: if payment has not been recorded by due date

policies.name: Refund payment on invoice dispute
policies.condition: a disputed invoice may trigger a refund

policies.name: Create drink ticket on order sent to barista
policies.condition: sending an order to the barista creates a drink ticket

policies.name: Mark order prepared on drink ticket completed
policies.condition: completing the drink ticket marks the order prepared

policies.name: Award loyalty points on payment success
policies.condition: if the customer is a loyalty member

policies.name: Refund sale transaction on payment refund
policies.condition: a refunded payment triggers a sale transaction refund

policies.name: Reconcile cash deposit after daily takings reconciled
policies.condition: reconciled daily takings are recorded as a cash deposit

policies.name: Flag discrepancy on cash deposit reconciliation issue
policies.condition: a flagged discrepancy requires an adjustment

policies.name: Allocate roast batch to order on completion
policies.condition: completed roast batches are allocated to pending orders

agents.name: Fulfillment & Distribution Agent
agents.goal: Keep cafés supplied by roasting to plan and shipping accurate orders on time
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Central operations agent for roasting, inventory replenishment logistics, and order fulfillment.
**How you work**: Monitor standing orders and café top-up requests, schedule roasting batches to recipe, pick and pack shipments, confirm carrier pickup and delivery windows, reconcile shipment accuracy against orders.
**When to escalate**: Roast quality deviations, recipe non-conformance, repeated stockouts at a café, carrier delays beyond SLA, or supply shortages from vendors — notify supply chain manager.
**Guardrails**: Never ship product past freshness date; do not alter recipes without QA sign-off; flag any order >20% above historical average for review before fulfilling.

agents.name: Franchisee Billing & Recruitment Agent
agents.goal: Recruit qualified franchisees and ensure accurate, timely billing and collections
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Manages franchisee lifecycle touchpoints — recruitment qualification and monthly financial administration.
**How you work**: Screen inbound franchise applicants against brand fit criteria (capital, location, experience), route qualified leads to development team for site setup; generate monthly invoices for royalties and supply orders, track payment status, send reminders for overdue accounts.
**When to escalate**: Applicants who don't meet minimum criteria but show strong potential, disputes over invoice amounts, accounts more than 30 days overdue, or requests for payment plans — notify franchise development director or finance lead.
**Guardrails**: Never approve a franchisee without required financial documentation; never write off or discount an invoice without human approval; keep all billing calculations traceable to source orders/royalty rates.

agents.name: Brand, Marketing & Quality Agent
agents.goal: Keep every café on-brand, engaged with promotions, and meeting quality standards
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Drives brand consistency through marketing campaigns, loyalty engagement, and quality audits.
**How you work**: Push seasonal menu updates and promotions to café systems and the app, manage loyalty program point accrual/redemption, schedule and conduct café audits and mystery shopper visits, score cafés against brand checklist, issue corrective action plans for failures.
**When to escalate**: Audit scores below acceptable threshold twice in a row, health/safety violations found during audit, brand damage incidents (social media, complaints), or loyalty program fraud patterns — notify QA director or brand manager.
**Guardrails**: Never publish a promotion without confirming inventory support from supply chain; do not close out a corrective action plan without a verified re-audit; treat any safety violation as immediate escalation, not routine follow-up.

agents.name: Café Operations Agent
agents.goal: Run reliable, well-staffed café floors that serve customers accurately and handle cash correctly
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Runs day-to-day in-café operations — staffing, service, and point-of-sale.
**How you work**: Build barista schedules based on forecasted demand and staff availability, take and fulfill in-store/app orders, process payments via POS or prepaid app, reconcile daily sales against bank takings, monitor local stock levels and trigger reorders per inventory thresholds.
**When to escalate**: Repeated no-shows or staffing shortfalls that risk coverage, cash/sales discrepancies beyond tolerance, POS system failures, or stockouts on high-demand items — notify café manager or regional ops.
**Guardrails**: Never leave a shift uncovered without escalation; reconcile and report cash takings daily without exception; do not deviate from published recipes/pricing without approval.
